MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Oct-24-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
John Warner, Esq. for Moving party.
No other Appearance.

Hearing is held. Mr. Warner informs the court client is still in Iran. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTs MACARTHUR GLASS INC., ABBAS RAZAGHI's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD.

The unopposed motion by Counsel John G. Warner and Law Office of John G. Warner , counsel for Defendants and Cross-complainants Abbas Razaghi and MacArthur Glass, Inc., to be relieved as counsel is Granted.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
